bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the pulsing source icon and drive beam geometry through the custom light system rather than baked sprites.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_fixed_light_core_6f_32x32.png through AssetServer and create one six-frame atlas for all stationary sources.
runtime_notes: The source art should align with a 48 px beam width and the light-system origin at the center of the sprite.
Pulse motion should loop independently from any mirror or prism interactions.
Keep the outer casing dark so the bright core reads as the true hazardous center.

context.usage: Stationary light emitter that establishes the baseline beam geometry for shadow-routing puzzles.

shape.silhouette: Compact art-deco lamp core with a gold rim, bright central lens, and a narrow hazard flare pointing along the beam axis.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x32 px with six 32x32 frames.
The brightest pulse reads at frame 4 without losing the core silhouette shape.
The light origin is visually centered so beam alignment matches gameplay calculations.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
